title: SonicPesa payment activation result — App handoff (closure v2)

semantics.PAYMENT_PENDING: Provider has not confirmed success yet — continue bounded poll/verify.
semantics.PROVIDER_CONFIRMED_ACTIVATING: Backend marked payment completed; entitlement applying — poll verify until ACTIVE.
semantics.PHONE_CONFLICT: Payment succeeded; phone has active sub elsewhere — not a payment failure.
semantics.MOVED_TO_SIBLING_DEVICE: Entitlement on linked sibling device after migration.
semantics.FAILED: Provider or backend marked payment failed.
semantics.RETRYING: Temporary backend issue — retry verify with backoff.

app_behavior_required: Poll GET /api/payments/sonicpesa/status/:orderId or POST /api/subscription/verify until app_waiting_state is terminal.
When transaction_status=completed and app_waiting_state=PROVIDER_CONFIRMED_ACTIVATING, show activating not payment failed.
Honor retryable=true with exponential backoff capped at 30s during first 2 minutes after pay.

backward_compatibility.legacy_apps: status field SUCCESS/PENDING/FAILED unchanged; new fields additive.
